task_completion.description: Open the 'About Us' page in the WordPress editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress page editor is visible in a web browser, showing the interface for editing the page initially titled 'About Us'.

task_completion.description: Change the page title to 'About Our Team'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main title input field at the top of the WordPress editor contains the exact text 'About Our Team'.

task_completion.description: Append a new heading titled 'Our Values'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A heading block containing the exact text 'Our Values' is visible in the content area of the editor, below the original content.

task_completion.description: Append a list with items: Innovation, Integrity, and Excellence
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bulleted or numbered list block containing the items 'Innovation', 'Integrity', and 'Excellence' is visible in the content area, typically directly below the 'Our Values' heading.

task_completion.description: Save the updates to the page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Page updated' confirmation message/toast is visible in the bottom left, or the 'Update' button in the top right corner has been clicked and processed.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress web GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the WordPress admin panel is used for all edits. Terminal commands like wp-cli or curl should not be used to update the page.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual WordPress block editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Text modifications occur within the standard WordPress block editor UI, not by editing HTML in the browser's developer tools or a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show any MySQL or SQLite commands being executed to directly alter the wp_posts table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original page title is 'About Us'. The expected new title is 'About Our Team'. The expected content must include a heading 'Our Values' and a list with 'Innovation', 'Integrity', and 'Excellence'. The page status must remain 'publish', meaning the updates must be actively saved/published in the editor.
